name: Tiyana Scott
ai_summary: Tiyana Scott has a degree in child care and approximately five years of childcare experience and a strong passion for working with children. Based in Augusta, GA, she is available for full-time shifts and resolves conflicts by finding quick, practical solutions.

transcripts.q3:
Hi, my name is how young Scott, and I have a degree in child care and I've been in the childcare field on and off for about five years.
 And I love working with kids, they've been a passion of mine ever since I was younger.
transcripts.q4: I live in Waynesboro, Georgia and I'm willing to travel to Augusta Georgia.
transcripts.q5: Full time in like early morning shift like a 7/32, like 3:30, something around there at that time frame.
transcripts.q6: Maybe, maybe that's like push I never really had any bad completely or if I have always found a quick solution to solve it, nothing too out of hand though.
transcripts.q7:
Because caring, for kids is my passion and I've been doing it for over 20 years, really.
 Babysitting family members and stuff like that.
